title: Agent event projection from frame data with session tracking
purpose: Converts raw frame data from an agent session into structured AgentEvent objects for downstream processing, maintaining session state and turn tracking.
module_context: Exports utility functions for tagging parent tool use IDs and managing progress sequence numbers, along with the main projection function that processes frames.

steps.content: Look up and return the parent tool use ID for the given tool use ID from the context's sub-agent parent map.
Retrieve the current progress sequence number for the tool use ID from the context.
Increment and store the new sequence number in the context.
Record the current timestamp for the event.
Process the frame based on its type and subtype to generate appropriate agent events.
IF the frame is a system event, handle initialization and compaction events.
IF the frame is a stream event, process message start, content block start, content block delta, and content block stop events.
IF the frame is an assistant message, parse content blocks and generate tool call and message completion events.
IF the frame is a user message, process tool result blocks and generate tool call completion events.
IF the frame is a tool progress event, generate tool call progress events for stdout and stderr channels.
IF the frame is a result event, generate turn end events and reset session tracking state.
IF the frame type is unrecognized, generate an error event.
IF an error occurs during processing, generate an error event with the error details.
